title: eryngium tzeltal
intro: Eryngium tzeltal is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Apiaceae, commonly known as the caraway or carrot family. This plant is native to Mexico and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Eryngium tzeltal include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections, making it a valuable remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Eryngium tzeltal can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, as well as skin conditions like acne and eczema.
